code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import ProgressBar from'react-bootstrap/ProgressBar';import'./ScrollProgressBar.css';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";function ScrollProgressBar(){const[scrollPercentage,setScrollPercentage]=useState(0);useEffect(()=>{const handleScroll=()=>{const scrollTop=window.scrollY;const windowHeight=window.innerHeight;const documentHeight=document.documentElement.scrollHeight;const scrollPercentage=scrollTop/(documentHeight-windowHeight)*100;setScrollPercentage(scrollPercentage);};window.addEventListener('scroll',handleScroll);return()=>{window.removeEventListener('scroll',handleScroll);};},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"progressBarContainer",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ProgressBar,{now:scrollPercentage})});}export default ScrollProgressBar;
